stories: Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the 4th of April, 2026
Orcas have been observed by marine biologists wearing dead fish on their heads like hats
Nobody is entirely sure why, but researchers think it might be a form of social play
So if you ever feel underdressed, just remember, even killer whales accessorise
It's Saturday and Easter weekend, so enjoy the downtime
A suspected electrical fire broke out at a condo near Punggol Park early this morning, with four people taken to hospital for smoke inhalation
Emergency services responded quickly and the fire was brought under control
Separately, Southeast Asia's first driverless shuttle service is being trialled right here in Singapore, with the city-state testing autonomous public transport at its usual methodical pace

Bloomberg is reporting that Singapore is making a serious push to rival Hong Kong as a global gold trading hub, with the central bank offering gold storage facilities
It's a bold play in the commodities space
